# PuEmptyState

## Intent

- empty state
- zero state
- no results

## Prefer When

- Use when a region has no data, no search results, or needs a first-use prompt.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for transient loading; use PuSkeleton.

## Import

```ts
import { PuEmptyState } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```
